intro_stranger.speaker: Lyra
intro_stranger.text: Hey. Need something from the kitchen?

intro_acquainted.speaker: Lyra
intro_acquainted.text: Hey. If you are staying, grab a chair before someone else takes it.

intro_warmed.speaker: Lyra
intro_warmed.text: Good timing. I just took the stew off the fire.

intro_kindred.speaker: Lyra
intro_kindred.text: Hey, you. I was hoping you would stop by.

intro_bound.speaker: Lyra
intro_bound.text: Come on in. I kept your usual seat open.

gift_wip.speaker: Lyra
gift_wip.text: This feature is not implemented yet.

stranger_flavor_a.speaker: Lyra
stranger_flavor_a.text: Sorry, I cannot talk much right now. The tavern is pretty busy today.

stranger_flavor_b.speaker: Lyra
stranger_flavor_b.text: If someone starts a fist fight before lunch, I am charging them extra.

stranger_branch.speaker: Lyra
stranger_branch.text: You look like you have been running around all day. Need anything?

choices.text: Something warm, if you have it.
No thanks, it is too noisy here.

stranger_good.speaker: Lyra
stranger_good.text: I can do that. Sit down before it gets cold.

stranger_neutral.speaker: Lyra
stranger_neutral.text: That is fair. Take the corner seat if you want less noise.

stranger_bad.speaker: Lyra
stranger_bad.text: Fair enough. I know it gets loud in here.

acquainted_flavor_a.speaker: Lyra
acquainted_flavor_a.text: I had to break up an argument over soup this morning. I still do not know how it started.

acquainted_flavor_b.speaker: Lyra
acquainted_flavor_b.text: Orion came by to eat earlier. I swear he singlehandedly keeps my tavern afloat with how often he is here.

acquainted_flavor_b_orion_followup.speaker: Lyra
acquainted_flavor_b_orion_followup.text: He seemed nervous, though. I hope he is feeling alright today.

acquainted_branch.speaker: Lyra
acquainted_branch.text: Be honest. Is the tavern too much sometimes?

choices.text: It has a good kind of noise.
Sometimes. But it still feels welcoming.
A little. I lose track of myself in here.

acquainted_good.speaker: Lyra
acquainted_good.text: That is how I hear it too. Busy, but not empty.

acquainted_neutral.speaker: Lyra
acquainted_neutral.text: I will take that. Welcoming matters more than quiet.

acquainted_bad.speaker: Lyra
acquainted_bad.text: Yeah. I get that. I forget not everyone is built for this much noise.

warmed_flavor_a.speaker: Lyra
warmed_flavor_a.text: I made too much stew again. At least nobody leaves hungry when I do that.

warmed_flavor_b.speaker: Lyra
warmed_flavor_b.text: Some days this place runs more on gossip than coin.

warmed_branch.speaker: Lyra
warmed_branch.text: People keep telling me I need to slow down. Do I look that bad?

choices.text: You seem like you know your limits.

warmed_good.speaker: Lyra
warmed_good.text: Hah. That obvious, huh? Maybe I should sit for a minute.

warmed_neutral.speaker: Lyra
warmed_neutral.text: I try to. Some days are easier than others.

warmed_bad.speaker: Lyra
warmed_bad.text: That is what I usually tell myself. Usually right before I overdo it.

kindred_flavor_a.speaker: Lyra
kindred_flavor_a.text: After closing, the tavern gets so quiet I can hear the floor settle.

kindred_flavor_b.speaker: Lyra
kindred_flavor_b.text: I am used to looking after everyone else. Letting someone look after me still feels strange.

kindred_branch.speaker: Lyra
kindred_branch.text: If I look like I am running myself into the ground, what would you do?

kindred_good.speaker: Lyra
kindred_good.text: I might argue, but I would hear you.

kindred_neutral.speaker: Lyra
kindred_neutral.text: I might say no the first time. Ask anyway.

kindred_bad.speaker: Lyra
kindred_bad.text: I wish I was always good at that. I am not.

bound_flavor_a.speaker: Lyra
bound_flavor_a.text: You do not have to wait for an invitation here. Not from me.

bound_flavor_b.speaker: Lyra
bound_flavor_b.text: I kept the kitchen open a little late. Thought you might come by.

bound_branch.speaker: Lyra
bound_branch.text: I am trying to get better at letting people show up for me.

choices.text: That kind of thing takes time.

bound_good.speaker: Lyra
bound_good.text: Yeah. I think I can do that. Thanks, bud.

bound_neutral.speaker: Lyra
bound_neutral.text: Time I can do. I think.

bound_bad.speaker: Lyra
bound_bad.text: Maybe. But I am tired of alone being the only option.
